raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I was charged {$570.00} for a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX purchased from Best Buy using my Best Buy Citi store credit card. XXXX marked the package as delivered at XXXX XXXX ; however, I never received the merchandise. 

XXXX provided photo proof of delivery, but the image clearly shows a different building lobby that does not match my residential building. My building lobby is visually different, and I have submitted documentation showing this discrepancy. No signature was obtained, and the package was not delivered to my address. 

I contacted XXXX, who stated that their records show the package as delivered and advised me to contact the shipper. I contacted Best Buy to report non-receipt of the item, but Best Buy refused to provide a refund or replacement. I then filed a billing dispute with Citi for non-receipt of merchandise and provided supporting documentation, including XXXX communications and photographic evidence. 

Despite this, Citi denied my dispute, stating that the merchandise was delivered, without addressing the incorrect delivery location or the lack of proof that the package was delivered to my residence. The charge remains on my account for merchandise I never received. 

I am requesting that Citi properly review the evidence of misdelivery, reverse the charge, and correct this billing error. I should not be held responsible for a charge related to merchandise that was never delivered to me.
